_comment: Hydra (battle_dora2_spr.bin - palettes 0/1/2 = orange/ashen-violet/gold tiers). Tiers (Hydra/Greater Hydra/Tiamat). Structural twin of Dragon (dora1); pal0 == Tiamat HD BMP 1098/1099/1136 1:1 (quantized L1=0). From palette lightness + the dora1 sibling layout: Body (scales + WING membrane)=3..9 (dark->light); Belly / Feet (belly underscales + feet)=10,11,12,13,15. USER-CONFIRMED in-editor 2026-05-29: the wing recolors with Body, not this section, so this is labelled Belly / Feet. Outline (1), teeth/glint (2), and the cross-tier eye sentinel idx14 (blue/magenta/green per tier) left unthemed. shadeMode uniformHue.
